---
title: "Question 2"
author: "Yueci Zhou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
dm <- pharmaversesdtm::dm
ex <- pharmaversesdtm::ex
ae <- pharmaversesdtm::ae
vs <- pharmaversesdtm::vs
suppdm <- pharmaversesdtm::suppdm
dm <- convert_blanks_to_na(dm)
ds <- convert_blanks_to_na(ds)
ex <- convert_blanks_to_na(ex)
ae <- convert_blanks_to_na(ae)
vs <- convert_blanks_to_na(vs)
suppdm <- convert_blanks_to_na(suppdm)

adsl <- dm %>%
  select(-DOMAIN)

adsl <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    AGEGR9 = case_when(
      AGE < 18 ~ "<18",
      AGE >= 18 & AGE <= 50 ~ "18 - 50",
      AGE > 50 ~ ">50"
    ),
    AGEGR9N = case_when(
      AGE < 18 ~ 1,
      AGE >= 18 & AGE <= 50 ~ 2,
      AGE > 50 ~ 3
    )
  )

ex_ext <- ex %>%
  derive_vars_dtm(
    dtc = EXSTDTC,
    new_vars_prefix = "EXST"
  ) %>%
  derive_vars_dtm(
    dtc = EXENDTC,
    new_vars_prefix = "EXEN",
    time_imputation = "last"
  )

adsl <- adsl %>%
  derive_vars_merged(
    dataset_add = ex_ext,
    filter_add = (EXDOSE > 0 |
                    (EXDOSE == 0 &
                       str_detect(EXTRT, "PLACEBO"))) & !is.na(EXSTDTM),
    new_vars = exprs(TRTSDTM = EXSTDTM, TRTSTMF = EXSTTMF),
    order = exprs(EXSTDTM, EXSEQ),
    mode = "first",
    by_vars = exprs(STUDYID, USUBJID)
  ) %>%
  derive_vars_merged(
    dataset_add = ex_ext,
    filter_add = (EXDOSE > 0 |
                    (EXDOSE == 0 &
                       str_detect(EXTRT, "PLACEBO"))) & !is.na(EXENDTM),
    new_vars = exprs(TRTEDTM = EXENDTM, TRTETMF = EXENTMF),
    order = exprs(EXENDTM, EXSEQ),
    mode = "last",
    by_vars = exprs(STUDYID, USUBJID)
  ) %>%
  derive_vars_dtm_to_dt(
    source_vars = exprs(TRTSDTM, TRTEDTM)
  ) %>%
  derive_var_trtdurd() %>%
  mutate(
    ITTFL = if_else(!is.na(ARM), "Y", "N")
  )

vs_last <- vs %>%
  filter(!is.na(VSSTRESN) & !is.na(VSDTC)) %>%
  mutate(VSDT = as.Date(VSDTC)) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  summarise(VS_LASTDT = max(VSDT), .groups = "drop")

ae_last <- ae %>%
  filter(!is.na(AESTDTC)) %>%
  mutate(AESTDT = as.Date(AESTDTC)) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  summarise(AE_LASTDT = max(AESTDT), .groups = "drop")

ds_ext <- derive_vars_dt(
  ds,
  dtc = DSSTDTC,
  new_vars_prefix = "DSST"
)

ds_last <- ds_ext %>%
  filter(!is.na(DSSTDT)) %>%
  mutate(DSDT = as.Date(DSSTDT)) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  summarise(DS_LASTDT = max(DSDT), .groups = "drop")

trt_last <- ex_ext %>%
  mutate(EXSTDT = as.Date(EXSTDTC)) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  summarise(TRT_LASTDT = max(EXSTDT), .groups = "drop")

adsl <- adsl %>%
  left_join(vs_last, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  left_join(ae_last, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  left_join(ds_last, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  left_join(trt_last, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    LSTALVDT = max(
      c(VS_LASTDT, AE_LASTDT, DS_LASTDT, TRT_LASTDT),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```
